2026-04-14T11:16:16.4309811Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (6521 chars):
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4310440Z ---
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4310886Z description: |
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4311529Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4313840Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4315005Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4315800Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4316594Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4317092Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4317239Z on:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4317555Z   issues:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4317904Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4318283Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4318658Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4318999Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4319604Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4320325Z         required: true
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4320712Z         type: string
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4321082Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4321437Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4321649Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4321820Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4322058Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4322209Z network:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4322544Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4322879Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4323258Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4323503Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4323664Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4324240Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4324768Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4325108Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4325452Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4325813Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4326165Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4326496Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4326844Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4327191Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4327526Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4327871Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4328226Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4328549Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4328921Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4329264Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4329588Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4329941Z   noop:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4330301Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4330706Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4331035Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4331943Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4332943Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4333408Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4333899Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4334456Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4334830Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4335172Z         message:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4335709Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4336371Z           required: true
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4336769Z           type: string
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4337136Z         owners:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4337962Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4339101Z           required: true
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4339507Z           type: string
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4340035Z       steps:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4340399Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4340887Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4341351Z           env:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4341888Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4342532Z           with:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4342878Z             script: |
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4343282Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4343837Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4345637Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4345849Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4346579Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4347303Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4347787Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4348322Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4349043Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4349596Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4350019Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4350383Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4350792Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4350998Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4351225Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4351776Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4352315Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4352652Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4352823Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4354479Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4355829Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4356207Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4356421Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4356610Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4357191Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4357722Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4358160Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4358744Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4359302Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4359805Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4360239Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4360820Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4362122Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4362993Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4363396Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4364247Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4364872Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4365256Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4365706Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4365920Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4366086Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4366612Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4367154Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4367530Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4367914Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4368553Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4369161Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4369531Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4369739Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4369909Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4370490Z               try {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4371024Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4371775Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4372424Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4373082Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4373461Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4373667Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4373931Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4375013Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4375580Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4375959Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4376163Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4376528Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4377221Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4377827Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4378412Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4378789Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4379001Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4379175Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4379864Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4380679Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4381272Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4381673Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4381880Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4382070Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4382553Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4383007Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4383458Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4383908Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4384662Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4385254Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4385939Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4386581Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4387041Z                   })
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4387424Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4387715Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4387894Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4388511Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4389127Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4389509Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4389725Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4389900Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4390452Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4391011Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4391333Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4391482Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4391931Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4392544Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4393110Z                     body
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4393497Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4394360Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4395131Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4395787Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4396464Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4396851Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4397208Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4397414Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4397568Z tools:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4397893Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4398244Z   github:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4398578Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4399208Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4399919Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4400684Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4401263Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4401510Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4401677Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4402043Z ---

2026-04-14T11:16:16.4424693Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4425034Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4425927Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4426928Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4427386Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4427874Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4428247Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4428622Z       inputs:

2026-04-14T11:16:16.4431772Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4432707Z           required: true
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4433100Z           type: string

2026-04-14T11:16:16.4434838Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4435300Z           env:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4435835Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4436970Z           with:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4437328Z             script: |
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4437719Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4438385Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4438800Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4438993Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4439692Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4440412Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4440881Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4441414Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4442110Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4442654Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4443079Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4443438Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4443844Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4444240Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4444468Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4445020Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4445550Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4445882Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4446060Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4447389Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4448701Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4449090Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4449298Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4449488Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4450064Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4450595Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4451042Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4451618Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4452174Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4452663Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4453329Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4453908Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4455244Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4456124Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4456538Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4457261Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4457871Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4458258Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4458713Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4458918Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4459086Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4459615Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4460152Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4460533Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4460932Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4461603Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4462219Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4462587Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4462798Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4462961Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4463379Z               try {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4464235Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4464930Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4465681Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4466340Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4466713Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4466914Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4467176Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4467838Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4468396Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4468765Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4468974Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4469329Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4470030Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4470625Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4471216Z                 return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4471581Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4471791Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4471975Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4472655Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4473457Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4474263Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4474663Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4474872Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4475048Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4475539Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4475983Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4476436Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4476872Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4477360Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4477959Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4478648Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4479308Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4479778Z                   })
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4480156Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4480456Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4480638Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4481264Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4481866Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4482252Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4482457Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4482641Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4483186Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4483755Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4484247Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4484408Z                 try {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4484867Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4485456Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4485968Z                     body
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4486350Z                   });
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4487025Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4487800Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4488468Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4489144Z                   return;
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4489530Z                 }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4489881Z               }
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4490084Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4490228Z tools:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4490560Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4490892Z   github:
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4491228Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4491733Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4492765Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4493494Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4494359Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4494613Z 
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4494775Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4495331Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4495996Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T11:16:16.4528116Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
